name: Codeforces Statement Capture
description: Export Codeforces contest, gym, and group contest problem statements to a clean PDF.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://codeforces.com https://espresso.codeforces.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
